name: ClassificationRuleVocabulary
description: Closed code-owned field, predicate, value, and normalization descriptors that make rule contracts finite and deterministic.
schema_def: NormalizationDescriptor(version, unicode_form, case_fold, punctuation_policy, whitespace_policy, preserves_digits, preserves_token_order, max_input_length); FieldDescriptor(field_key, value_type, allowed_predicates, max_value_length); PredicateDescriptor(predicate_kind, operand_type, cardinality); RuleCondition(condition_id, ordinal, field_key, predicate_kind, value_text?, value_minor_min?, value_minor_max?, enum_value?); allowed fields: description.normalized, account.id, amount.direction, amount.absolute_minor; logical composition: AND only
